## Summary

<!-- 1–3 bullets describing the change -->

## Type

<!-- One of: feat / fix / chore / docs / refactor / test / style / ci -->

## Verification

<!-- See docs/workflow.md §4 "Checkpoints I must verify myself" -->

- [ ] Ran `pnpm dev` and exercised the feature locally
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:run` passes
- [ ] Edge cases tested (empty / very long / Korean + emoji / nested markdown)
- [ ] Print preview verified via Cmd/Ctrl+P — if the change affects render
- [ ] Mobile viewport (≤ 768px) — if the change affects layout

## Agent reports

<!-- See docs/workflow.md §3 -->

- [ ] Verifier agent (end-user persona) report attached, or N/A because: \_\_\_
- [ ] Reviewer agent (senior FE) report attached, or N/A because: \_\_\_
